title: paeonia mascula subsp. russoi
intro: Paeonia mascula subsp. russoi, also known as the Dalmatian peony, is a subspecies of perennial flowering plant belonging to the family Paeoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia mascula subsp. russoi include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and other conditions related to hormonal imbalances. Paeonia mascula subsp. russoi is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
